hero.title: Home Maintenance Planner
hero.description: Plan recurring and one-time home maintenance tasks, track due dates, record costs, and keep service details organized.

flow.title: Plan ? Track ? Complete ? Review
steps: Create a task for a home area and category
Set a due date, priority, recurrence, and reminder lead time
Complete recurring work and let the next due date move forward
Review overdue, upcoming, and cost summaries

differences.title: Keep household work visible without turning it into a project system
differences.description: Home Maintenance Planner focuses on personal scheduling and records for apartments, homes, villas, and family residences.

items.title: Areas and categories
items.description: Organize work by spaces such as kitchen, bathroom, HVAC, plumbing, appliances, exterior, and general maintenance.

items.title: Recurring due dates
items.description: Weekly, monthly, quarterly, six-monthly, yearly, and custom schedules move forward predictably when completed.

items.title: Service records
items.description: Optional provider, reference, estimated cost, actual cost, and notes fields keep useful context near each task.

feel.title: A practical maintenance board for the home
feel.description: The workflow keeps attention on what is due, what is overdue, and what was completed recently.

items.title: Clear priorities
items.description: Due-soon and overdue indicators help users decide what to handle next.

items.title: Reusable setup
items.description: Default areas and categories reduce setup time while still allowing personal labels.

items.title: Plain records
items.description: Costs and provider details are optional notes, not a contractor marketplace or inspection system.

audiences.title: Who uses Home Maintenance Planner
audiences.description: Useful for people who need a private record of home maintenance work and reminders.

items.title: Families
items.description: Coordinate recurring household work such as AC servicing, cleaning, and appliance care.

items.title: Homeowners and villa residents
items.description: Track exterior, garden, roof, plumbing, and servicing tasks in one place.

items.title: Renters
items.description: Remember appliance care, filter cleaning, minor upkeep, and landlord reference notes.

resourceSection.title: Maintenance planning essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep the useful details close to the task without adding heavy operations tooling.

items.title: Tasks
items.description: Create, edit, complete, reopen, archive, restore, and delete maintenance tasks.

items.title: Schedules
items.description: Use one-time or recurring schedules with predictable next due dates.

items.title: Insights
items.description: Review overdue work, upcoming tasks, priorities, categories, areas, and cost totals.

groupedSection.title: From home area to completed work
groupedSection.description: Use one protected workflow for maintenance planning and record keeping.

items.name: Areas
items.description: Group tasks by room, system, or exterior area.

items.name: Categories
items.description: Classify the kind of work being planned.

items.name: Tasks
items.description: Search, filter, sort, and update maintenance tasks.

items.name: Insights
items.description: Review overdue, upcoming, recent completion, and cost patterns.

technicalSection.title: Built for private maintenance records
technicalSection.description: Home Maintenance Planner follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: API-driven overview metadata and generated API contracts.
Planning-only wording with no professional inspection, safety guarantee, emergency service, or contractor certification claims.

finalCta.title: Ready to organize home maintenance?
finalCta.description: Open the planner and create the first maintenance task.
